jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
